title: Recovery Compass on Death/Respawn
description: A datapack where when you respawn, you are given a recovery compass which helps you find where you last died easier. 1.21-1.21.10
body:
When you respawn, you are given a recovery compass which helps you find where you last died easier.

I made this for 1.21.10 because i can't find any similar datapacks that worked.

you can change the pack format if you want to use it on older 1.21 versions

## **ATTENTION!!!** I HAVE UPLOADED AN ADDON (under versions) THAT COMES WITH THE MAIN PACK! YOU MUST USE IT TOGETHER WITH THE MAIN DATAPACK FOR THE BEST EXPERIENCE!
ITS CALLED **"Hello, Death!"**, it makes the Recovery Compass on Respawn Datapack a well rounded Datapack.
**Features that it adds!**
- Removes the recovery compass as soon as you arrive at your last death location.
- Your death location has a 3-block radius player detector that detects the owner of the death location. When they are within the 3-block radius, they trigger all the other features
- Customizable Sounds & Particles that trigger when you enter your death location!

_Context: this was intended to be a feature within the main pack but it was too difficult to create logic and it kept breaking the pack for me, AND NOW it works perfectly as separate packs._


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### **TO ACTIVATE (MAIN REC COMPASS PACK)** (YOU MAY NOT NEED TO DO THIS ANYMORE)
**when in-game after you've already put the datapack into your world's datapacks folder**

1. do **/function compass_respawn:setup**

2. then do **/function compass_respawn:update**
   
3. and now you are all set.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
